title: A Midsummer Night's Dream
summaries: "A Midsummer Night's Dream" by William Shakespeare is a comedy play written in about 1595 or 1596. Set in ancient Athens, the story weaves together multiple plots: four young lovers entangled in romantic confusion, amateur actors rehearsing a play for a royal wedding, and fairies engaged in their own disputes. When these groups converge in an enchanted forest, the mischievous fairy Puck uses magical love potions that turn everyone's affections upside down, creating chaos under the moonlight.
